text_block_list.text: Several days after the tryouts...

The siblings Biwa Hayahide and Narita Brian find themselves
surrounded by enthusiastic trainers.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer
text_block_list.text: I'm beggin' ya! Just gimme a minute of your time!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Tch... What a pain. I told them I haven't even raced in tryouts yet.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Don't say that. You're receiving scouting offers regardless. That's
proof of their confidence in you.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I still don't like it...

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer
text_block_list.text:
No one beats my drive! I can lead you straight to the Triple Crown!
Please, Beast!

text_block_list.name: New Trainer
text_block_list.text:
I'd treat you the best! What do you say, Brian? No one would pay
more respect to your natural talent than me!

text_block_list.name: New Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that goes for you too, Biwa Hayahide! Let me train you! A little
sibling rivalry to sharpen our training! Sounds great, doesn't it?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'm pleased at the offer, but I remain undecided. I must humbly
decline.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Well then... I will be going on ahead, Brian.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Huh? Hey, if you're gonna leave, take these scavengers with you!

Biwa Hayahide departs with a smile on her face. But under that smirk,
I glimpse a hint of concern.
I decide to follow her out of curiosity.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Oh, it's you again. I believe I saw you watching us from a
distance earlier.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Did you follow me? Haha, seeing as how you helped with my glasses,
I suspect you mean no harm.

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: Please, Sis! Wait for me! Huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Girl B
text_block_list.text: Hahaha! Come on, hurry up! We're almost at the finish!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
...My cherished little sister. She may appear aloof, but she is actually
an earnest and good person.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Yes... As children we always amused ourselves racing in parks like
this. She was competitive and often wound up crying, since I was the
faster one then.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
But... she said she loved racing and had fun running with me. She was
always following in my footsteps.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I wish I could've always been a sister she could look up to.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Ever since then, our goal has remained unchanged—to race in the
Twinkle Series together.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
We were always together... That's why I could sense it. My sister's...
Narita Brian's unique qualities began to surface.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
And then her physical abilities swiftly grew to surpass mine. Power,
speed, stamina... She has them all in spades.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Everyone knows she's a rare phenomenon. In time, she'll become a
"Beast" on par with President Symboli Rudolf.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: That's why I needed an edge. But one that differs from hers.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
What I lack in physical prowess, I make up for in precisely planned
strategies. And when there is a limit to training time, I maximize
efficiency.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I have constructed formulas based on my theories, and I will find the
solution to victory—using my "winning equation!"

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Haha, it's still a work in progress. My equation can't contend with
Brian yet.

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: Sniffle. No fair! I wanna run super fast like you...

text_block_list.name: Girl B
text_block_list.text: Don't cry! There, there. Here, I'll tell you my secret!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: We made a promise.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
She may not even remember, but... it doesn't matter. As her older
sister and as an Umamusume, I must keep my word.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
We will stand together at the Twinkle Series—and we will have the
greatest race of our lives!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: And with my perfected winning equation—I will claim victory!

The mysterious, ever calm, and collected Biwa Hayahide actually
hides an intensely burning desire within.

And in her empirical running, I see entirely new possibilities for
racing!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Huh? What did you say?
choice_data_list: I want to help write your winning equation!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: S-so you mean?! But... I'm still not sure if I'm ready.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: And more importantly... are you certain?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: ...That I'm the sibling you want?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I've written all the theories I'm developing in this notebook. Of
course, my winning equation is here as well.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: But today it seems I must write about an additional important matter.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: It concerns you, Trainer. I'll label this section with your name.
And so, I become Biwa Hayahide's trainer.

Together, we vow to complete the unbeatable winning equation and
achieve her goal.
A few days pass since teaming up...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: (Hm, what is this? I hear more talk of Brian than usual.)

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: So is it true?! That Brian's gonna race in the Sprout Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Yeah, seems legit!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
(The Sprout Kinen... Even among Junior runners, only the most
esteemed racers can gain entry!)

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Wooow! Amazing! It's totally unheard-of for a pre-debut Umamusume
to be chosen!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Brian's on a completely different level!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: So you've run even further ahead.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: And that's why I will complete my winning equation!
